hooks.command: CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *)   [ -f _tools/graphify/graph.json ] &&   echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Use graphify query \"<question>\" — NEVER read _tools/graphify/GRAPH_REPORT.md directly (12MB+)."}}' || true ;; esac
